content: Hey, I'm Frankie Scott, nice to chat with you. I've been volunteering at the local animal shelter on weekends and I just love it. We had 15 dogs adopted out last Saturday alone.
That's amazing, Frankie! It's great to hear that you're passionate about helping animals. What made you decide to volunteer at the shelter?

I've always been an animal lover, and I have a bit of free time on the weekends since I'm a music producer and DJ. I get to play piano and produce music during the week, but on weekends, I like to give back to the community.
That's really cool. Music and volunteering are a great combination. Do you have any pets of your own?
Actually, I don't have any pets right now, but I do have a friend who's a veterinarian in Los Angeles. She's always telling me about the latest animal rescue stories.
Los Angeles is a big city, I'm sure there are plenty of animal rescue stories to go around. Have you ever thought about running a marathon to raise money for the animal shelter?
Funny you should mention that, I'm actually training for a marathon right now. I've got a big race coming up on November 12th, and I'm hoping to raise $5,000 for the shelter.
That's fantastic, Frankie! You must be really dedicated to your training. What's your favorite way to relax after a long run?
I love to unwind with a cold beer, and I've even started home brewing my own beer in my free time. It's a great way to relax and experiment with new flavors.
Home brewing sounds like a fun hobby. Maybe one day you can brew a special batch for the animal shelter's fundraising event.
That's a great idea, I'll have to look into it. Thanks for chatting with me, it's been really helpful to talk through my ideas for the shelter.
